title: atheteo #0114
definition:
1) to do away with, to set aside, disregard
 2) to thwart the efficacy of anything, nullify, make void, frustrate
 3) to reject, to refuse, to slight
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to do away with, to set aside, disregard
 2) to thwart the efficacy of anything, nullify, make void, frustrate
 3) to reject, to refuse, to slight

    NASB:  to do away with what has been laid down, set aside:
